title: DEKTON Pro 7 Function Spray Nozzle Kit | Adjustable Watering Patterns for Gardens, Lawns, and Outdoor Cleaning | Ergonomic Grip | Durable & Leak-Proof Design | Ideal for Plants, Car Washing, and More
features: 7 Versatile Spray Nozzle Kit : This Dekton spray nozzle offers eight adjustable spray settings, including mist, shower, jet, cone, flat, center, and full, providing versatility for all your watering needs.
Ergonomic Comfort Grip: Designed with an ergonomic, non-slip grip handle for added comfort during extended use. Ensures you can water your garden or clean outdoor surfaces with ease and precision.

Leak-Proof Design: Constructed , leak-proof materials, this spray nozzle ensures a steady and reliable water flow without waste. Perfect for reducing water consumption while maintaining optimal performance.

Durable & Long-Lasting: Built to withstand outdoor elements, the nozzle is made from durable, rust-resistant materials. It ensures long-lasting functionality for regular garden watering, car washing, and outdoor cleaning.

Quick & Easy Connection: The spray nozzle easily attaches to standard garden hoses for quick setup and use. Ideal for a variety of outdoor tasks, from watering delicate plants to cleaning cars, patios, and outdoor furniture.
description: The Dekton Pro 7 Function Spray Nozzle Kit offers ultimate versatility for all your watering and outdoor cleaning needs. Featuring eight adjustable spray settings—including mist, shower, jet, cone, flat, center, and full—this nozzle ensures precise control over water flow for various tasks, whether you're watering delicate plants or tackling tougher outdoor cleaning projects. With an ergonomic non-slip grip, the spray nozzle provides comfort during extended use, making it easier to handle large garden areas or long cleaning sessions. Its leak-proof design ensures steady water flow without unnecessary waste, promoting water conservation. Built from durable, rust-resistant materials, the nozzle is designed to withstand the elements, ensuring long-lasting performance for regular use. Connecting easily to standard garden hoses, the Dekton Pro 8 Function Spray Nozzle is perfect for a range of outdoor activities, including watering gardens, washing cars, cleaning patios, and more. Simplify your outdoor routine with this reliable, easy-to-use tool.
